news.t: Are Vanguard ETFs really the best deal?
Dimensional Adds Three New US Equity ETFs to Growing Offering

holdings.infoBox: DFSV is an equity ETF with a total of 1033 individual holdings. The top holdings are CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS stock at 1.38%, BorgWarner at 0.90%, Knight-Swift Transportation Holdings at 0.80%, Invesco at 0.77%, and Amkor Technology at 0.77%.

overview.description: The Dimensional US Small Cap Value ETF (DFSV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund actively invests in broad and diverse portfolio of US small-cap companies. Stock selection is based on value characteristics and weighted by market capitalization. DFSV was launched on Feb 24, 2022 and is issued by Dimensional.
